productDisplayName: Baggit Women Quick Cobra Pink Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can even just carry this piece without a bag!Dimensions: 12 cm x 9 cmCreated from genuine leatherette with a bow detail on the flapThree fold design that has a concealed magnetic closureOne pocket along the sideA photo id holder and a pocket on the left foldFour card holder slots on the centre foldA zippered pocket on the backCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
